{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302033469B8A13B83365D0A93DB"}"},"total":1169},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616710281238119230","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"良品：
开局异梦，经验值系统。智斗克苏鲁写的挺好，文笔一般，对于在番茄看腻爽文来说，很解腻。但是实力成长太慢了，出了开局的特殊事件还不来波大成长就太单调了。
综上：爱看爽文的读者，不推荐。质量有要求的读者，可看。","text_exts":[{"e":20,"s":17,"text":"克苏鲁","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742026155D0A93DB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227616710281238119230%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227578123553401228350%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773405417,"group_id":"7578123553401228350","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"心理学与玄幻相结合。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6Ihk2V8nHGVOjfTrg0a03yVeLddW03tcbF0cJowlTDz","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e42e43cc6e94479286ea2a657f24a788~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792157&x-signature=huF9%2FJBewilIyTBxaI9vO36C4Yg%3D","user_id":"2575520649196064","user_name":"我叫白老登"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2575520649196064","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578123553401228350","book_info":{"abstract":"【克苏鲁+经验条+谨慎流+脑子在线】
陆渊穿越了。
没有系统面板，没有签到奖励，只有视野角落一行灰白色的小字。
读一本书——【帝国语：+1】
制一颗药——【药物学：+0.1】
解剖一只怪物——【禁忌学：+0.5】【理智：-3】
学什么涨什么，看什么懂什么。
听起来是最完美的金手指。
直到他发现——这个世界的知识是活的。
学得越深，看见的就越多。看见的越多，理智就掉得越快。
理智归零的人，要么变成怪物，要么比怪物更惨。
而偏偏，经验条涨得最快的，永远是那些不该被人类知道的东西。
青铜城的符文镇压着地底的蠕动，守夜人在黑暗中猎杀异化体，知识之海里沉睡着能让文明覆灭的秘密。
所有人都在选一条窄路，深海、血肉、诅咒—，专精一样，苟活一世。
只有他的经验条告诉他：你可以全都学。
代价是，全都承受。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bf6ae05dcb829070e30b79821c6c9505","author":"三条河","author_id":"","book_id":"7578123553401228350","book_name":"穿越克苏鲁，我能看见经验条","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"19.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":6,"name":"奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=6&name=奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7578138785620165182","read_count":"197130","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"642858"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"243","tags":"西方奇幻,奇幻,玄幻,穿越,奇幻仙侠,克苏鲁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a5f45e55bb35c04bbbe727a9cf148a88~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386615&x-signature=2JhkujHffjqnYQXPYn0lYUgRjj4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52539176611","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"156"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302033469B8A13B83365D0A93DB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,
